Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Hmm this is a detailed query about translating a formal DECLARE model into a practical description of a loan approval process The user wants a stepbystep explanation realworld motivations and consequences of deviations

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The DECLARE model is quite technical but the request is about making it understandable and practical I should break it down into stages map each constraint to a realworld rationale and emphasize the why behind each rule

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user provided clear activity descriptions so I can start by outlining the logical flow from application to disbursement then explain how constraints enforce compliance and order Finally Ill connect each constraint to broader goals like risk management or customer experience

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The tone should be instructive but not overly technical more like explaining to a colleague how the process works in practice Ill avoid jargon unless its necessary and Ill keep the focus on the practical implications of the model
